title: No-Code AI App Building
overview: Bubble, Glide, and Softr jaise no-code platforms use karke complete web applications build karein aur OpenAI/Claude APIs connect karke smart AI SaaS products launch karein.
objectives: No-code app platforms landscape aur matching databases layout design samajhna.
UI/UX layout and styling rules (Figma design mappings) build setup structure.
OpenAI API endpoints connect and parse dynamic data prompts inputs inside no-code structures.
Real SaaS app (Resume Builder/Content generator) deploy publish pricing systems configure.

phases.title: Phase 1: Database & UI (Weeks 1-2)
phases.desc: Glide / Bubble database configurations, container layouts, buttons event maps.

phases.title: Phase 2: API integrations (Weeks 3-4)
phases.desc: OpenAI / Anthropic API links, webhook configurations, dynamic content generation.

phases.title: Phase 3: Launch & Billing (Week 5)
phases.desc: Publishing, connecting Stripe / Lemon Squeezy billing, SaaS launch checklists.

lessons.title: Glide vs Bubble vs Softr platform selections
lessons.content:
No-code software engineering businesses ke liye fast prototype building aur SaaS applications deploy karne ka direct pipeline structure map karta hai.

### Platform Matrices:
- **Glide**: Best for data-driven internal portal layouts, spreadsheets databases, mobile-first designs.
- **Softr**: Excellent for client portals, Airtable dynamic listings databases, simple responsive designs.
- **Bubble**: Premium robust logical workflow editor, custom database design parameters support, heavy applications development.
lessons.code: Glide Database Type: Google Sheets / Glide Tables (Direct sync)
lessons.diagram: App Concept -> Complexity analysis -> Tool Selection (Glide vs Softr vs Bubble)

quiz.question: Data-heavy customer portals with Google Sheets sync tasks target recommended platform:
options: Glide tables or Softr with Airtable connectors
Only local Excel spreadsheets directories setup
quiz.explanation: Glide and Softr natively abstract spreadsheet connections into clean mobile/web layouts.

assignment.title: Map a SaaS database schema layout check task
assignment.prompt: Create an entity relationship layout linking customer profiles sheet with orders list table.

lessons.title: Configuring REST API calls and Webhook blocks inside Bubble / Glide workflows
lessons.content:
Integrating OpenAI completion endpoints to no-code applications inputs parameters mapping rules.

### Configuration steps:
- **API Connector**: Define authorization headers, endpoint URLs, request payload schema.
- **Dynamic parameters**: Map text input box fields to prompt query variables.
lessons.diagram: User click Generate button -> UI input data pass -> API Connector payload dispatch -> UI content reload

quiz.question: No-code apps API call payloads parsing rules parameters dynamic inputs are wrapped in:
quiz.explanation: No-code platform API controllers use curly braces to map UI data dynamic inputs into outgoing request strings.

assignment.title: Setup an API lookup logic connector block task
assignment.prompt: Create a dummy ChatGPT mock request connector flow in Glide/Bubble database.

lessons.title: Publishing app on domain, connecting Stripe payment gateways and landing page marketing
lessons.content: SaaS monetization configurations, custom domain mapping rules, Stripe payment link setups, pricing layouts options.
lessons.diagram: Landing page buy button -> Stripe checkout portal -> Webhook confirmation -> App user subscription active status update

quiz.question: Stripe pricing configurations require webhook endpoint setup inside app databases to:
options: Automatically activate subscription privileges when charge events succeed
Log user password values in text tables
Bypass custom domain validations rules settings
quiz.explanation: Stripe webhook triggers sync transaction success events directly with no-code user database tables status updates.

assignment.title: Draft a SaaS launch timeline calendar checklist task
assignment.prompt: Document landing page sections layouts, DNS setup parameters, and product launch tasks scheduling checklist.

capstone.title: Complete AI SaaS Resume Optimizer & Job Tracker Portal
capstone.description: Construct an end-to-end web app using Glide/Bubble where users upload resume text, specify job tags, generate AI optimization reports, and save application pipelines to personal dashboards.

interview_questions.question: How do you secure API keys in Bubble or Glide without exposing them to the frontend user browser inspector?
interview_questions.answer: In Bubble, utilize the standard API Connector by checking the 'Use as action' property and ensuring API private authorization headers are marked as 'Private' (only processed server-side). In Glide, use secure background proxy actions or tables settings that evaluate keys strictly server-side.
